title: Invisiron Mod
description: Adds a new invisible ore to your world than can be crafted just like iron (hopefully).
body:
Description

This mod adds a new ore called "Invisiron Ore" to the world that can be mined and used to create "Invisiron Items" these items aren't invisible but instead have a white outline, by replacing the stick with an "Invisiron Rod" you can create invisible items, be careful not to drop them.

Story

This mod is one that I've made and remade for a few years now, hopefully now I'll keep this mod saved for future use. It's a mod I thought was fun when I first made it and now I've just remade it because my little brother thought it would be fun to play again.

Future

I plan to make this mod lighter and more friendly to the eyes of any potential future programmer, but to get into more specifics I would like to add: * Ore Updating Functionality: to allow them to change how lit they are during different parts of the day. * Proper Ore Distribution: I'm still finding that sweet spot. * A way to see the "Invisible" items while they're in your hand yet not show them off to others. * Inter-Mod Compatibility for mods like "Easy Paxel".
